raw: Pass reserved at Gleason Public Library, Carlisle MA. Includes access to more than 60 wildlife sanctuaries across the state. Each pass admits up to four (4) people at $2 per person (children under 2 free) Please note that some sanctuaries may require reservations before visiting. Always check the Mass Audubon website before planning a visit: https://massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/our-wildlife-sanctuaries/trails. For questions, visit the Mass Audubon website or call 781-259-9500. Passes made available by Friends of Gleason Public Library.
